concerns.text: T026 claims 'Validate algorithm implementation for CORE invariants only (crossing number, braid index)' but FR-003/SC-008/SC-010 explicitly state core invariants are TABULATED from Knot Atlas, not computed. Algorithm validation applies only to additional invariants in Phase 2+. This task semantically weakens the spec by suggesting algorithm validation for tabulated data.

T002 creates pyproject.toml but plan.md Project Structure shows requirements.txt. Constitution Principle III (Data Hygiene) requires dependency pinning; plan.md specifies requirements.txt. This creates a plan/tasks contradiction on dependency file format.

T009 and T043 both implement missing_invariant_flags in code/data/validator.py. T009 is in Foundational phase, T043 in User Story 4. This creates duplicate implementation work and potential inconsistency in flag system design.

T065 (citation validation) and T066 (content hashing) reference Constitution principles but lack explicit linkage (e.g., 'per Constitution Principle II/V') in task descriptions. For audit traceability, tasks implementing Constitution principles should explicitly cite the principle.

T067-T072 are reviewer-driven tasks (dan-rockmore-simulated, marie-curie-simulated reviews) not explicitly in spec.md. These should be documented as addressing incorporated reviewer feedback rather than appearing as unexplained scope expansion.
